understanding.goal_understanding: Finish the current level (BP35) by navigating the player to the goal gem tile marked '+', avoiding death and doing so efficiently within the turn limit and attempt limit.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Each turn you choose an action (moves and optional tile clicks). MOVE_LEFT/RIGHT/UP/DOWN shifts the player one tile in that direction when possible, and then gravity (currently DOWN) causes the player to fall until supported, which can result in larger position changes after a move. CLICK on a specified coordinate removes a clickable tile at that location (if present), changing the terrain and thereby altering future movement/falling paths; clicking can also be used without moving the player. Spike tiles are lethal: landing on a spike ends the attempt immediately and the level restarts (you have 2 attempts per level). Each attempt has a 50-turn budget. Undo was not used in this episode; generally, undo would revert the most recent action(s) to recover from a mistake when available.

moving_platform.warning: URGENT: rising platform will reach you in 6 horizontal moves. Clicks do not advance the platform. Move upward (toward lower y) or die.

URGENT: rising platform will reach you in 2 horizontal moves. Clicks do not advance the platform. Move upward (toward lower y) or die.
URGENT: rising platform will reach you in 2 horizontal moves. Clicks do not advance the platform. Move upward (toward lower y) or die.
URGENT: rising platform will reach you in 0 horizontal moves. Clicks do not advance the platform. Move upward (toward lower y) or die.
URGENT: rising platform will reach you in 0 horizontal moves. Clicks do not advance the platform. Move upward (toward lower y) or die.
